Load Lead
—
Fields marked * are required to promote this lead from New to Working: a source (with its detail), a description, a target organisation + contact (name + email or telephone), and a logged next action (Engagements tab). The moment they're all set the lead becomes Working; these fields then stay editable for a short grace window (the countdown) before they lock — and an edit that breaks the requirements drops it back to New.
Lead Origin
Type the referrer's name. If we already know them, pick the match; otherwise add their contact details — we'll create the contact when this lead is promoted.
